MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. KATIE DANIELSON OF THE BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO, TEL. NO. 865-9211 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT WILLIS JOHNSON;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT WILLIS JOHNSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS DENIED, FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AS REQUIRED.
